query:
INSERT INTO river_tracks (river_track_id, river_id, user_id, track_name, description, track, created_at, updated_at)
                VALUES (?1, ?2, ?3, ?4, ?5, ?6, ?7, ?8)
                ON CONFLICT (river_track_id)
                DO UPDATE SET
                    river_id = ?2,
                    user_id = ?3,
                    track_name = ?4,
                    description = ?5,
                    track = ?6,
                    created_at = ?7,
                    updated_at = ?8
                RETURNING river_track_id;
